result:
Gate-3 validator + tests implemented, tested login-safe, left uncommitted for orchestrator review.

## Changed files (both NEW; nothing else touched, nothing staged)
| File | sha256 |
|---|---|
| `nd-unfolding/pet/validate_p3f_pet_fullevent.py` | `3d240a7d59f0a8a215a3932250638df29f96a63a9e2f8814d865b77b491754a6` |
| `nd-unfolding/tests/test_p3f_pet_fullevent_validator.py` | `c0fb48ea119ff73fcb5b59db5d972753c49986b7db8c78d02818f8198b25301a` |

The existing base validators (`validate_g2_fullevent_smoke.py`, `validate_g2_fullevent_domain.py`) and every launcher are **byte-unchanged** (git status clean). No compute launched, no commit/push, no PET training.

## What the validator does
- **Composes the complete base G2 validator** (`validate_g2_fullevent_smoke.py`) via read-only subprocess to a WORK-side base receipt and **fails closed** unless it ran, exited 0, `status==PASS`, `n_failed==0`, `n_checks>=50`. The base result **owns** the four trees, background clouds/weights, data & MC identities, full-event metadata + `g2-fullevent-v1` schema, native misses, completeness, branch parity, finite/populated content.
- **Adds active-universe checks** against the authoritative C++ marker names: `activeUniverseBand`==expected band, `activeUniverseIndex`==expected endpoint, `hasActiveUniverse==1`, `activeUniverseIsLateral==1`, and the four signed migration-census `TParameter<long>`s (`activeUniverse{Truth,Reco}{Entrants,Exits}`) exist and are integral & non-negative.
- **Validates the request against the declared 5├Ч2├Ч12 = 120 inventory**: bands `BeamAngleX, BeamAngleY, MuonResolution, Muon_Energy_MINERvA, Muon_Energy_MINOS` (from `active_universe_5d/fps/<BAND>_<IDX>/`); endpoints `{0,1}`; playlists `1A,1B,1C,1D,1E,1F,1G,1L,1M,1N,1O,1P` (Gate-1 `playlist_order`).
- **Output JSON** binds input ROOT path/sha256/size, base validator path/hash/full result, this validator hash, expected vs observed active identity + census, base counts, per-component + single PASS/FAIL verdict. **Receipt written unique-temp + fsync + atomic `os.replace` ONLY to the caller-supplied `--work` path**; never publishes a final ROOT or production receipt (defensive guard also refuses `--work == --root`).

## Tests (39, all ROOT-free/login-safe)
`Inventory` (120-combo mapping + unknown band/wrong-case/out-of-range endpoint/non-integer/unknown playlist negatives), `ActiveMetadata` (valid + wrong band/index, not-enabled, not-lateral, missing marker, `cv`-control rejected), `MigrationCensus` (present/integral/nonneg; zero ok; missing/non-integral/negative fail; names match C++), `BaseResultComposition` (PASS + status/failed/exit/not-ran/too-few-checks negatives), `ReportVerdict` (all-pass PASS; each component failure flips to FAIL; payload binds all evidence), `AtomicWorkReceipt` (writes only to work path, **no publication on FAIL**, temp cleaned), `SyntaxAndImport` (py_compile + default points at the existing base validator).

**Full regression:** `test_p3f_pet_fullevent_validator` 39, `test_fullevent_gate2` 28, `test_fullevent_fps` 25, `test_fullevent_dump_contract` 10, `test_g2_dump_branch` 32 тАФ **134/134 OK**. Validator byte-compiles.

Test command: `python3 nd-unfolding/tests/test_p3f_pet_fullevent_validator.py` (root_6_28 env, `HOME=/global/homes/j/josephrb`).

## Residual blockers (runtime, not this round)
1. **No G3 ROOTs exist yet** тАФ Gate-3 requires FRESH 120-file selection-shifted full-event generation with the canonical binary (SHA `61d7dfbfтАж`, built from `486e53e`) under `MNV101_ACTIVE_UNIVERSE=BAND:IDX` + `MNV101_DUMP_POINTCLOUD=1` + `MNV101_FULL_PHASE_SPACE=1`. The MD5-`e63c` scalar ROOTs are controls only.
2. **Validator not yet exercised against a real ROOT** тАФ the ROOT reads + base-validator subprocess + file hashing in `main()` need PyROOT on a compute node; only the pure logic is verified here. Per-endpoint runtime invocation (`--root тАж --band тАж --endpoint тАж --playlist тАж --work тАж`) is the remaining step once the fresh ROOTs land.

Gate-3 is **not** claimed PASS: the validator is ready and unit-verified, but no selection-shifted full-event ROOT has been generated or validated. Edits left uncommitted for orchestrator review.
